seoTitle: How to View Pages Side by Side in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to view multiple Canva pages side by side so you can compare designs, keep branding consistent, and speed up your review process.
intro: Flipping between pages one at a time makes it hard to spot inconsistencies across a multi-page design. This guide shows how to view pages side by side in Canva, adjust the layout for comparison, and use that view to keep your branding and formatting consistent. It's useful for presentations, social media sets, and any project with multiple related pages.

steps.heading: Enable the side-by-side view
steps.body: Turn on Canva's side-by-side viewing option so multiple pages appear on screen at once.

steps.heading: Adjust the layout for comparison
steps.body: Arrange the visible pages so you can easily compare design elements across them.

steps.heading: Compare designs for consistency
steps.body: Use the side-by-side view to check that colors, fonts, and layouts stay consistent across your project.

steps.heading: Apply this to your design workflow
steps.body: Rely on side-by-side viewing whenever you're building multi-page projects like presentations or social media sets.

faq.question: Why would I need to view pages side by side in Canva?
faq.answer: It helps you compare multiple pages at once, which is useful for maintaining consistency across presentations, social graphics, or marketing materials.

faq.question: Is the side-by-side view available for all project types?
faq.answer: The feature is generally useful for any multi-page Canva project where comparing pages helps with design consistency.

faq.question: Does this help with brand consistency?
faq.answer: Yes, businesses often use this view to maintain consistent branding and visual integrity across multiple pages or formats.

faq.question: Is this feature suitable for Canva beginners?
faq.answer: Yes, it's designed to be accessible for new users while still being useful for experienced designers managing larger projects.
